Even After All These Years

source: El Rey Theater, Dec. 19, 1997 Tracks: 

Disc one
Maggie's Farm
Man In The Long Black Coat
Cold Irons Bound
Just Like A Woman
Can't Wait
Silvio
Oh Babe It Ain't No Lie [E Cotten] (acoustic)
Love Minus Zero (acoustic)
Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic)
When I Paint My Masterpiece
Joey + Band intro

Disc two
'Til I Fell In Love With You
Highway 61 (Sheryl Crow-vocals/guitar)
Knockin' On Heaven's Door (Crow-vocals/accordian)
Love Sick
Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
Bonus:
Like A Rolling Stone
It Ain't Me Babe (acoustic)
Mr Tambourine Man (acoustic)
Roving Gambler (acoustic)
One Too Many Mornings (acoustic)
My Back Pages (acoustic) 


Source / Venue:
El Rey Theater, LA, CA  December 19, 1997
Bonus: 3 tracks each from El Ray 17th & 18th
